texto: But somehow, once you start playing behind the steering wheel of God, you realize just how powerful it is to be the imagination driving the natural world (64).
explicacao: Citação de Kola Boof sobre temas ligados a fe. “But somehow, once you start playing behind the steering wheel of God, you realize just how powerf…” articula fe, creation, god em registro de fe, com relevância para contextos como god e religion.

frase_original: But somehow, once you start playing behind the steering wheel of God, you realize just how powerful it is to be the imagination driving the natural world (64).

texto: My look, mind you, is not chocolate like Lauryn Hill, Whoopi Goldberg, or Naomi Campbell - it is pitch black and shimmering like the purple outer space of the universe. I am the charcoal that creates diamonds. I am the blackest black woman (41).
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Kola Boof: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “My look, mind you, is not chocolate like Lauryn Hill, Whoopi Goldberg, or Naomi Campbell - it is …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, beauty, black pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
